name: EnderCooldown
author: JonyGamesYT9
readme_markdown:
[![](https://poggit.pmmp.io/shield.state/EnderCooldown)]

EnderCooldown | v2.0.0

EnderCooldown for PocketMine-MP, written in PHP-8 and only supports PocketMine-MP 4.0.0

⚡ Features:

  • Permission for the cooldown not to affect the user.
  • Personalized messages.
  • PocketMine-MP 4.0.0 (Only).
### ✒ Permissions: | Permission | Description | | --- | --- | | `endercooldown.bypass` | `The User who has this permission will not be affected by the cooldown.` |
